overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a player character walking through a dystopian urban industrial area at night. The scene features neon-lit graffiti-covered walls, elevated highways, scattered NPCs, and a gritty atmosphere with dominant red and green artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered alley leading to industrial plaza

events.description: turns left from narrow graffiti alley into open industrial plaza

agents.ego_description: walking along a graffiti-covered green wall and turning into an open plaza area

entered.detail: green concrete wall covered in black and white graffiti tags and street art
large elevated concrete highway structure with metal supports overhead
dark industrial building with red neon lighting and metal fencing

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a narrow alley with a graffiti-covered green wall on the left, then turns left into a more open industrial plaza. The area is dimly lit with artificial lighting, featuring elevated highway structures overhead and industrial buildings with red neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza with parked truck and gathered NPCs

events.description: approaches group of NPCs gathered around a parked truck
moves through the crowd of NPCs who scatter and move around the vehicle

agents.ego_description: approaching and moving through a group of NPCs gathered near a parked truck

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing near the truck, some moving away as the player approaches

entered.detail: dark colored utility truck parked in the center of the plaza
stack of cardboard boxes and crates on the ground near the truck

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wide industrial plaza and approaches a group of NPCs gathered around a parked truck. As the player moves through the crowd, the NPCs scatter and move around the vehicle. The elevated highway structure looms closer overhead, and cardboard boxes are scattered on the asphalt ground.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall industrial building and elevated structure overhead

agents.ego_description: walking down the street and looking up at the towering industrial building

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Having passed the truck and crowd, the player continues down the industrial street. The camera tilts up to reveal the massive scale of the elevated highway structure and a towering industrial building with red-lit windows. A distant skyscraper with illuminated windows is visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street corner with barrel fire

events.description: approaches a barrel fire with two NPCs warming themselves, lighting becomes warmer

agents.ego_description: approaching two NPCs standing around a burning barrel fire

notable_agents.action: two NPCs standing around a barrel fire, warming their hands and conversing

entered.detail: metal barrel with open fire burning inside, providing warm orange light and smoke
scattered newspapers and trash littering the ground near the fire

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the end of the street where two NPCs stand around a burning barrel fire. The lighting shifts to a warmer tone from the fire's glow, illuminating the scattered newspaper debris on the ground. The industrial building remains visible on the right as the player draws near to the fire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a gritty industrial district that transitions from a narrow, neon-lit alley into a wide, oppressive urban plaza. It begins by moving past a graffiti-covered green wall before turning left into an open area dominated by red neon accents and looming elevated highway structures. As the camera advances, it pushes through a scattering crowd of NPCs gathered around a parked truck amidst debris-strewn asphalt. The perspective then tilts upward to emphasize the massive scale of the overhead highway and a towering industrial building with red-lit windows against a distant skyscraper. Finally, the scene shifts toward a warmer glow as the camera approaches two figures standing beside a burning barrel fire surrounded by wind-blown newspaper.
